Alistar.trading_pattern: Alistar trades with heal but Bard's Q can slow and setup ganks. Use chimes wisely.

power_spikes.you: Level 6 with Magical Journey, early chime stacks

Alistar.early_game: Trade carefully and roam for chimes. Don't get all-in'd.

Alistar.positioning: Keep distance from his engage range. Use portals for escape.
